title: CSAF Extension: Documentation 13
description: Representation of a valid extension for configurations used for documentation purposes.

configuration_id_t.title: Reference token for configuration instance
configuration_id_t.description: Token required to identify a configuration so that it can be referred to from other parts in the document. There is no predefined or required format for the configuration_id as long as it uniquely identifies a configuration in the context of the current document.

configuration_t.title: Configuration
configuration_t.description: Contains the description of a configuration and assigns it a configuration id.

details.title: Details of the Configuration
details.description: Contains all details as human-readable description on how to identify the configuration.

relationship_t.title: Relationship
relationship_t.description: Establishes a link between an existing full_product_name_t element and a configuration, allowing the document producer to define a combination that form a new full_product_name entry.

configuration_reference.title: Configuration Reference
configuration_reference.description: Holds a Configuration ID that refers to the Configuration element, which is referenced as the second element of the relationship.

product_reference.title: Product reference
product_reference.description: Holds a Product ID that refers to the Full Product Name element, which is referenced as the first element of the relationship.

$schema.title: CSAF Extension Schema
$schema.description: Contains the URL of the CSAF Extension JSON schema which the JSON object promises to be valid for.

category.title: Extension Category
category.description: Holds the category of the extension content.

content.title: Content
content.description: Contains the additional information in its properties.

configuration_tree.title: Configuration Tree
configuration_tree.description: Contains configurations and their bindings to products.

configurations.title: List of Configurations
configurations.description: Contains a list of configuration elements.

relationships.title: List of Relationships
relationships.description: Contains a list of product-configuration combinations.

critical.title: Critical
critical.description: Determines whether using the extension would fail a mandatory test.
